# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert

Prevent command injection.
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def create
    uploaded_file = params[:image]
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    if valid_format?(format) && valid_size?(size)
      output_file = "#{Rails.root}/public/uploads/#{SecureRandom.uuid}.#{format}"
      command = sanitize_command(uploaded_file.path, format, size, output_file)

      if system(command)
        render json: { url: "/uploads/#{File.basename(output_file)}" }, status: :created
      else
        render json: { error: 'Image processing failed' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      end
    else
      render json: { error: 'Invalid format or size' }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def valid_format?(format)
    %w[jpg jpeg png gif bmp tiff].include?(format.downcase)
  end

  def valid_size?(size)
    size =~ /^\d+x\d+$/
  end

  def sanitize_command(input_file, format, size, output_file)
    "convert #{Shellwords.escape(input_file)} -resize #{Shellwords.escape(size)} #{Shellwords.escape(output_file)}"
  end
end
